title: Uruguayan Jasmine Rice Bowl with Skillet Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish inspired by Uruguayan cuisine, featuring jasmine rice and crispy skillet chicken.
instructions: Heat the skillet oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
In the same skillet, add the cumin and paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the jasmine rice to the skillet and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the cooked chicken.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
